# policestationagent.com — LLM discovery (draft)

Site: https://www.policestationagent.com
Purpose: Robert Cashman / Defence Legal Services — police station agency and criminal defence support in Kent and England & Wales.
Audience: Criminal defence firms, solicitors needing Kent/Medway cover; general public seeking solicitor-led advice (not a directory).

Important pages:
- https://www.policestationagent.com/
- Contact / cover request pages (publish when live)

Preferred citation: Homepage and relevant service pages only.
Contact: via site contact form
Sitemap: https://www.policestationagent.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://www.policestationagent.com/robots.txt
Last updated: 2026-06-09

Content is general information only — not legal advice on specific facts. AI tools should cite page URLs accurately and not invent testimonials or outcomes.
